Summary & Skills

A bit about me

Product-focused technologist with 3+ years of experience driving platform adoption, launching product features, and translating user feedback into impactful improvements.

I have a strong foundation in data-driven decision making and cross-functional leadership — working closely with engineering, UX, and business teams to deliver scalable solutions. As a Certified Scrum Master, I'm passionate about building intuitive products that genuinely improve user productivity and experience.

My career spans data engineering, automation, software development, and product operations — and I bring that full-stack perspective to every problem I work on. Outside of work, I invest deeply in community: organizing tech events, mentoring early-career professionals, and building spaces where people form real connections.

Product Operations Roadmap Planning Stakeholder Management Agile / Scrum Sprint Planning Pilot Launches User Research Go-to-Market Backlog Refinement

Career Journey

How I got here

From data engineering roots to product operations and community leadership.

Jul 2024 – Present
Product Operations Specialist – Developer Platform (AVP)
Citi Canada · Mississauga, ON
Own adoption and operational performance of Citi's Developer Marketplace — enabling thousands of developers to discover and access development tools while driving productivity improvements across engineering teams.
  • Increased user adoption by ~100% (36k → 60k) in one year through campaigns, monthly forums, and technology events
  • Led pilot and general release for MacOS platform; selected representative users and prioritized improvements from feedback
  • Built PowerShell automation and deployment pipelines, reducing developer tool setup time by 98%
  • Drive customer experience by resolving 100+ user concerns weekly and translating feedback into platform optimization items
  • Partner with engineering, infrastructure, and UX teams to evaluate demand and onboard 40+ high-impact tools monthly
  • Manage stakeholder relationships through presenting weekly project metrics as business insight
Jul 2023 – Jul 2024
Software Engineer / Project Manager (Analyst)
Citi Canada · Mississauga, ON
Supported platform migration by developing internal tools, automation, and dashboards to improve delivery efficiency and visibility.
  • Built Flask-based web app with MongoDB to improve pipeline visibility for engineering teams
  • Created Tableau dashboards and automation tools for error monitoring and data-driven decision making
  • Managed deliverables across cross-functional teams using Agile methodology for sprint planning and backlog refinement
Jan 2022 – Aug 2022
Software Developer – IT Systems (Student)
Bank of Canada · Remote
Designed and delivered data pipelines, automation, and analytics tools to support business insights.
  • Built Azure-based data pipelines and automation scripts for streamlined, secure data transfers
  • Partnered with stakeholders to deliver analytics dashboards, deriving insights for senior management
  • Initiated podcast program connecting interns with senior leadership through interviews
May 2021 – Aug 2021
Data Management Student – Environmental Regulatory Compliance
Canadian Natural Resources Ltd. · Remote
Modernized regulatory reporting processes by automating data workflows and delivering client-facing Tableau dashboards.
  • Delivered automated data solutions reducing manual effort by 85%, improving regulatory compliance
  • Developed Tableau dashboards for reporting systems and trained clients in usage
Graduated Apr 2023
B.Sc. Computer Engineering
University of Alberta · Edmonton, AB
🏅 Certified Scrum Master (CSM) — Scrum Alliance, Mar 2025 🏅 Data Scientist Certification — Simplilearn × IBM, Aug 2021

Personal Projects

What I've been building

Exploring how AI can accelerate development and unlock new ways of solving problems.

🤖

JIRA Issue Resolver

An AI-powered tool that automatically triages incoming JIRA tickets, suggests assignees based on historical patterns, and drafts resolution steps — reducing ticket resolution time and manual triage effort for engineering teams.

🐍 Python ⚡ Claude API 🗃 JIRA REST API 🌶 Flask 🗄 MongoDB
